holdings.infoBox: SMLF is an equity ETF with a total of 911 individual holdings. The top holdings are EMCOR Group stock at N/A, Sterling Infrastructure at N/A, Flex Ltd. at N/A, BLK CSH FND TREASURY SL AGENCY at N/A, and nVent Electric at N/A.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. SmallCap Equity Factor ETF (SMLF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the STOXX US Small Cap Equity Factor index. The fund tracks an index of small-cap US equities. Stocks are selected and weighted to increase exposure to four factors (quality, value, momentum, and low volatility). SMLF was launched on Apr 28, 2015 and is issued by BlackRock.
